treatment_transfer.name: timestamp
treatment_transfer.documentation: The time that the transfer occured specified as a datenum (if global clock) or in seconds (if local clock).

treatment_transfer.name: clocktype
treatment_transfer.documentation: The clock type of the timestamp. Use a global clock if available.

treatment_transfer.name: entity_name
treatment_transfer.documentation: The name of the entity that was transfered (e.g 'blood' or 'medium').

treatment_transfer.name: entity_ontologyNode
treatment_transfer.documentation: The ontology node id of the entity that was transfered specified as ontology:nodeID (e.g 'EMPTY:0000002' or 'UBERON:3373').

treatment_transfer.name: method_name
treatment_transfer.documentation: The name of the method that was used to transfer the entity (e.g 'blood transfusion' or 'titanium pick').

treatment_transfer.name: method_ontologyNode
treatment_transfer.documentation: The ontology node id of the transfer method specified as ontology:nodeID (e.g 'EMPTY:0000002' or 'UBERON:3373').
